name: Bitwise XRP ETF
summary: . Summary The Bitwise XRP ETF (the Trust) is an exchange-traded product that issues common shares of beneficial interest (Shares) that are listed on NYSE Arca, Inc. (the Exchange) under the ticker symbol XRP. The Trusts investment objective is to seek to provide exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trusts operations and other liabilities.
